Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake part catalogs, promotions, and product highlights to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual content research that would take 30+ minutes per campaign.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email—subject line, body copy, and CTAs—tailored to R1 Concepts' brand voice and current product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, conversion-optimized email copy in seconds, replacing the need for a dedicated copywriter and enabling consistent daily sends.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the target contact list, and triggers the send via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the entire email build-and-send workflow, ensuring daily campaigns reach segmented audiences on schedule without manual HubSpot configuration.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls Dynamic Friction Company product listings, featured items, and active promotions from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Guarantees that marketing emails reflect the latest DFC inventory and deals, removing the bottleneck of manual product research.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Drafts a daily marketing email with compelling subject lines, product-focused body copy, and calls-to-action aligned with DFC's B2B brand voice.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers high-quality, audience-targeted email content daily without creative team involvement, scaling DFC's outreach capacity significantly.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the generated email as a HubSpot marketing email, associates it with the appropriate DFC contact lists, and initiates the scheduled send.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates manual email setup and scheduling in HubSpot, ensuring DFC maintains a consistent daily email cadence that drives repeat B2B engagement.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot, including customer details, order history, and issue descriptions.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all ticket data for AI processing, ensuring no support request is missed and agents have full context before responding.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and urgency, then drafts a context-aware reply using R1 product knowledge and support best practices.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces average ticket response time from hours to seconds and ensures consistent, accurate replies, freeing the support team to focus on complex escalations.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification, attaches the draft reply for agent review, and logs the processing metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow within HubSpot so agents can review, approve, and send AI-drafted replies in one click, streamlining the resolution pipeline.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Retrieves Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions that customers have filed through HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Captures every product return and issue report automatically, ensuring no customer feedback is lost and creating a complete dataset for trend analysis.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each submission into a structured Google Sheet with categorized columns for issue type, product, date, and resolution status.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Provides the operations team with a real-time, filterable dashboard of customer issues, enabling rapid identification of recurring product defects or fulfillment problems.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity tracking for DFC customers browsing the R1 Concepts website, detecting page views, product searches, and engagement signals.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Identifies high-intent DFC customers in real time, giving the sales team the opportunity to reach out while buyer interest is at its peak.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Empowers sales reps to act on live buying signals within minutes, increasing conversion rates and strengthening DFC customer relationships through timely, relevant outreach.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chatbot on R1 Concepts' website, handling product questions, order inquiries, and support requests in real time.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide 24/7 instant customer support, reducing wait times and improving customer satisfaction while deflecting routine inquiries from the human support team.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will process customer inputs through AI models integrated with R1's product catalog and CRM data to generate accurate, personalized responses.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable intelligent self-service that resolves the majority of customer interactions without human intervention, scaling support capacity without additional headcount.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, bloggers, and influencers relevant to the brand's niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the open web to surface creator candidates that wouldn't appear through platform-only searches, expanding the discovery pool significantly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls detailed creator profiles from YouTube and Instagram, including subscriber counts, engagement rates, content themes, and contact information.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with verified social metrics, enabling data-driven decisions about which creators are worth pursuing for partnerships.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and consolidates discovered creator data, ranks relevance to target keywords, and outputs a structured list of potential creator candidates.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw discovery data into an actionable shortlist in minutes, replacing days of manual influencer research and ensuring consistent evaluation criteria.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria such as audience size, engagement quality, content relevance, brand safety, and niche fit.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Eliminates subjective guesswork from creator selection by applying consistent, data-backed scoring, ensuring only the highest-potential creators advance to outreach.

Creator Qualifier.action: Generates a qualification summary for each creator with a pass/fail recommendation and justification based on the weighted scoring results.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Gives the marketing team a clear, defensible rationale for each creator decision, accelerating approval workflows and maintaining quality standards at scale.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and brand guidelines stored in Google Drive to inform AI-generated messaging.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand standards, maintaining consistency across hundreds of creator contacts.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator, tailoring the message based on their content style, platform, and audience.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly personalized outreach at scale, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic templates while saving hours of manual email writing.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators via Gmail, tracks delivery status, and queues follow-up messages in the sequence.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the entire outreach send-and-follow-up process, ensuring timely communication with every qualified creator without manual email management.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies, capturing response content, sentiment cues, and negotiation points from incoming emails.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response goes unnoticed and immediately feeds reply data into the AI for rapid, informed follow-up.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes creator responses using learned negotiation patterns from previous influencer email conversations and drafts contextually appropriate follow-up replies.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles ongoing creator negotiations intelligently, applying lessons from past successful deals to maximize partnership conversion rates and secure favorable terms.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted response via Gmail and logs the full conversation thread and negotiation outcomes to Google Drive for future learning.
Creator Reponse.impact: Closes the communication loop automatically while building an ever-improving knowledge base of negotiation patterns that makes future outreach more effective.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide to match vehicle part numbers against current availability.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly search performance data including impressions, clicks, average position, and keyword rankings for all DFC blog posts generated by the SEO agent.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the latest weekly performance metrics and previous month's data from all paid channels.
